# DocShift

> Free, browser-based PDF tools. Merge, compress, convert, split, edit, sign, redact, OCR, and translate PDFs entirely in your browser. No uploads, no signup, no tracking.

DocShift is a privacy-first PDF toolkit. Every tool runs 100% locally via Web Workers and WebAssembly — your files never leave your device.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.docshift.tech/): Free PDF Tools Online – Merge, Compress, Convert
- [About](https://www.docshift.tech/about): About DocShift and the privacy story
- [Contact](https://www.docshift.tech/contact): Support, feedback, collaboration
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.docshift.tech/privacy): Data-handling commitments
- [Terms of Service](https://www.docshift.tech/terms): Terms of use

## Tool Pages (Organize)

- [Merge PDF](https://www.docshift.tech/tool/merge-pdf): Combine multiple PDFs into one document
- [Split PDF](https://www.docshift.tech/tool/split-pdf): Break a PDF into separate pages or ranges
- [Remove Pages](https://www.docshift.tech/tool/remove-pages): Delete specific pages from a PDF
- [Extract Pages](https://www.docshift.tech/tool/extract-pages): Pull selected pages into a new PDF
- [Organize PDF](https://www.docshift.tech/tool/organize-pdf): Drag-and-drop reordering, rotation
- [Scan to PDF](https://www.docshift.tech/tool/scan-to-pdf): Convert JPG/PNG/WebP camera scans into one PDF

## Tool Pages (Optimize)

- [Compress PDF](https://www.docshift.tech/tool/compress-pdf): Shrink PDF file size in browser
- [Repair PDF](https://www.docshift.tech/tool/repair-pdf): Rebuild corrupted xref tables, recover content
- [OCR PDF](https://www.docshift.tech/tool/ocr-pdf): Make scanned PDFs searchable and selectable

## Tool Pages (Convert to PDF)

- [JPG to PDF](https://www.docshift.tech/tool/jpg-to-pdf): Convert images to PDF with margin/orientation control
- [Word to PDF](https://www.docshift.tech/tool/word-to-pdf): Convert DOC/DOCX to PDF
- [PowerPoint to PDF](https://www.docshift.tech/tool/pptx-to-pdf): Convert PPT/PPTX to PDF
- [Excel to PDF](https://www.docshift.tech/tool/excel-to-pdf): Convert XLS/XLSX to PDF
- [HTML to PDF](https://www.docshift.tech/tool/html-to-pdf): Save any public webpage as a PDF

## Tool Pages (Convert from PDF)

- [PDF to JPG](https://www.docshift.tech/tool/pdf-to-jpg): Export PDF pages as JPG images
- [PDF to Word](https://www.docshift.tech/tool/pdf-to-word): Convert PDF to editable DOCX
- [PDF to PowerPoint](https://www.docshift.tech/tool/pdf-to-pptx): Convert PDF to editable PPTX
- [PDF to Excel](https://www.docshift.tech/tool/pdf-to-excel): Extract PDF tables to XLSX
- [PDF to PDF/A](https://www.docshift.tech/tool/pdf-to-pdfa): Convert to ISO 19005 archival format

## Tool Pages (Edit)

- [Rotate PDF](https://www.docshift.tech/tool/rotate-pdf): Fix page orientation (90/180/270°)
- [Add Page Numbers](https://www.docshift.tech/tool/page-numbers): Insert custom page numbers
- [Add Watermark](https://www.docshift.tech/tool/add-watermark): Stamp text over PDF pages
- [Crop PDF](https://www.docshift.tech/tool/crop-pdf): Trim PDF margins visually
- [Edit PDF](https://www.docshift.tech/tool/edit-pdf): Add text, shapes, images, annotations

## Tool Pages (Security)

- [Unlock PDF](https://www.docshift.tech/tool/unlock-pdf): Remove PDF password / restrictions
- [Protect PDF](https://www.docshift.tech/tool/protect-pdf): Add AES-256 password encryption
- [Sign PDF](https://www.docshift.tech/tool/sign-pdf): Draw/type/upload eSignature
- [Redact PDF](https://www.docshift.tech/tool/redact-pdf): Permanently blackout sensitive info
- [Compare PDF](https://www.docshift.tech/tool/compare-pdf): Side-by-side diff of two PDFs

## Tool Pages (Intelligence)

- [Translate PDF](https://www.docshift.tech/tool/translate-pdf): AI-powered translation that preserves layout

## Key Differentiators

- **No uploads** — every tool runs in the browser; no server sees your file.
- **No signup** — no accounts, no emails, no friction.
- **Free forever** — no premium tiers, no watermarks, no usage caps.
- **Open source** — code on GitHub at https://github.com/soumyachk101.
